metadata.description: A suite of Claude Code skill plugins for making AI-assisted development sessions reliable and productive across time.

plugins.name: session-kit
plugins.description: All 6 session-kit skills — the complete suite: /notes, /warmup, /stable-label, /fast-chat, /dictation, /sharpen.

plugins.name: session-kit-core
plugins.description: Session experience layer: /warmup, /fast-chat, and /dictation. Loading reliability, rapid chat interaction, and input correction.

plugins.name: session-kit-refine
plugins.description: Knowledge management layer: /notes, /stable-label, and /sharpen. Institutional memory, stable references, and process improvement.
